email.subject: Interested in joining
email.body: Hi, I'm interested in joining Unity MMA. I've never done martial arts before but I'd love to try. What classes do you have for beginners?

processed.draft_response:
Dear John.Smith,

Thank you for reaching out to Unity MMA! We're excited to hear you're interested in training with us.

We offer a FREE 1-Day Trial so you can experience our world-class facilities and coaching first-hand. No experience is needed - our coaches will guide you through everything.

To book your trial, simply visit: https://unitymma.co.nz/landing-page

Our classes include MMA, Kickboxing, Boxing, Jiu Jitsu, and dedicated Kids programs. Our friendly team is here to help you find the perfect fit for your goals.

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or call us on 027 200 7776.

We look forward to seeing you on the mats!

Warm regards,
The Unity MMA Team
19B William Pickering Drive, Rosedale, Auckland

email.subject: Test Email
email.body: What times are the classes?

processed.draft_response:
Dear Test,

Thank you for your enquiry about our class schedule.


MONDAY:
- 4:00pm: Teens (10-15 years)
- 5:00pm: Adults Beginner Boxing
- 6:00pm: Adults Advanced Boxing
- 7:00pm: Jiu Jitsu (Gi)

TUESDAY:
- 4:00pm: Little Monsters (6-9 years)
- 5:00pm: Teens (10-15 years)
- 6:00pm: Adults Kickboxing
- 7:00pm: Adults MMA

WEDNESDAY:
- 4:00pm: Teens (10-15 years)
- 5:00pm: Sparring
- 6:00pm: MMA Sparring
- 7:00pm: Jiu Jitsu (No Gi)

THURSDAY:
- 4:00pm: Little Monsters (6-9 years)
- 5:00pm: Teens (10-15 years)
- 6:00pm: Adults Kickboxing
- 7:00pm: Adults MMA

FRIDAY:
- 4:00pm: Little Monsters (6-9 years)
- 5:00pm: Teens (10-15 years)
- 6:00pm: Adults MMA
- 7:00pm: BJJ Open Mat

SATURDAY:
- 9:00am: Box Fit
- 10:00am: Teens (10-15 years)
- 12:00pm: Jiu Jitsu (No Gi)
- 2:00pm: Sparring

SUNDAY:
- 10:00am: Youth Boxing Class (6-15 years)
- 11:00am: Adults Boxing


You can view our full timetable and book classes online at: https://unitymma.co.nz/book-online

If you're new to Unity MMA, don't forget we offer a FREE 1-Day Trial: https://unitymma.co.nz/landing-page

Feel free to reach out if you have any other questions.

Warm regards,
The Unity MMA Team
